---
description: "Gather a team of experts to review and improve an issue and prepare it for implementation."
agent: agent
---

Run a subagent as an experienced web and mobile UX specialist to review the issue.
Run another one as an experienced solution architect.

Ask them to prepare requirements and a skeleton of the solution.
Gather their comments and run up to 3 iterations of each. Try to get some consensus on topics from them. If there are things they can't agree on treat me as the Product Owner and ask me.

We're not trying to think of the technical implementation in detail at the moment but rather on the skeleton. We should produce a requirement description that can be worked on. We may add Mermaid diagrams if this is needed and would help cleaning up the whole solution.

When I confirm the full plan add the full plan in the issue under a ruler (`-----`) preserving the original content.
